description: Prospective pre-match -> post-match closed loop on top of the pre-match forward ledger. Pre-match prediction is LOCKED before kickoff (immutable, write-once), the match is played without touching it, and post-match an audit row is APPENDED that scores the locked prediction against the local result. No model change, no external fetch.

stores.post_match_audit: data/forward_ledger/w1_post_match_audit.jsonl (NEW, append-only, one row per fixture once result known, gitignored)
stores.prospective_report: data/forward_ledger/w1_prospective_calibration_v1.json (NEW, gitignored live aggregate; RESULT.md keeps a point-in-time snapshot)

result_source: data/results/round1_results.json (tracked local facts ledger) ONLY — no external fetch
lock_scope_v1: market-implied 1X2 probabilities only (the pre-match ledger has no OU ladder; exact-score/OU/BTTS prospective is deferred to a future V2 that would add OU to the snapshot)

pre_match_view_fields.lock_as_of_utc: string (UTC ISO, REQUIRED, MUST be <= kickoff_utc when kickoff known)
pre_match_view_fields.candidates_snapshot: object (optional for rows locked before W1_OPPORTUNITY_SELECTOR_PHASE_A; future locks copy the same read-only candidate payload from the pre-match snapshot without rewriting old fixtures)
pre_match_view_fields.availability: object (context availability copied from the locked snapshot)
pre_match_view_fields.locked_at_utc: string (provenance: when the view was locked)

post_match_audit_fields.fixture_id: string (REQUIRED, must reference an existing pre_match_view)
post_match_audit_fields.lock_as_of_utc: string (copied from view; MUST be <= kickoff_utc when kickoff known)
post_match_audit_fields.locked_prediction: object (copied verbatim from the view; MUST equal the view — immutability)

hard_rules: pre_match_view is immutable & write-once per fixture: never rewrite or delete; if a view exists for a fixture, the lock script skips it.
lock_as_of_utc MUST be <= kickoff_utc (genuine prospective, no hindsight). Snapshots taken after kickoff are NOT eligible to lock.
post_match_audit MUST copy locked_prediction verbatim from the view and MUST NOT alter it (immutability).
post_match_audit only when a LOCAL result exists (data/results/round1_results.json); no external fetch.
append-only on every store; all prospective stores are gitignored.
no model change: w1_score_engine / DEFAULT_RHO / decision_policy / odds thresholds untouched.
no betting / money / hit-rate language; model-market divergence is not phrased as an opportunity.
